understanding.goal_understanding: Navigate the character across the tile grid to reach the goal gem (+) within the turn budget, avoiding death hazards (spikes u/v) and using interactions to open viable fall paths when needed.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn you can MOVE_LEFT or MOVE_RIGHT horizontally; after that move, gravity automatically carries the character in the current gravity direction until it lands on a solid/support tile (o/m/w), hits spikes (u/v) and loses immediately, or reaches the goal (+) and wins. CLICK targets a specific tile position [x, y] to remove a breakable/clickable block (x) to change future fall/landing outcomes without moving the player. UNDO reverses the previous action to recover from a bad move or click.
